title: King's Blocks
description: This Mod was made for people to Suggest Blocks to be added into Minecraft and For all to play around with said blocks
body: This mod is designed for the community to suggest blocks they’d like to see added. Based on your suggestions, new blocks will be continuously incorporated into the project. This initiative aims to explore which blocks get added, who will create the textures, and to gauge the variety of block ideas people want to see in Minecraft. If you’d like to contribute by adding a block, please fill out this form: [https://forms.gle/rnmskM9fSUycmQmb8](https://forms.gle/KC6BGfY5kQCSVuKT7). You can submit as many suggestions as you want!
